entry.title: Re: Limitation on storage locations
entry.content:
As mentioned before, this is not our recommendation. We want to convice the customer that this is not a good practice. A technical limitation would have been one argument to put on our list. That is why I posted the question here. My assumption is also that there is no limitation except the one that comes from the lenght of the ID. But it might have been that there is a limit of maybe 999 - because as both of you mentioned, that should by far be sufficient and I don't know if there were ever created more than that.

However, if you have other valid reasons against doing this, it will be highly appreciated if you share them. Telling the customer that he is insane doesn't seem to be good practice as well 🙂

entry.title: MDG Consolidation using BP SOA service
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have one question on MDG Consolidation process. We have 5 ECC source systems from where we need to load the vendor data(BP) into MDG Hub on S/4 HANA. I am trying to know how to use MDG Consolidation in this scenario using BP SOAP webservice. I have gone through a few blogs(Consolidation with SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA page 41 and 42) but things are not clear.

It would be a great help if any of you could provide me with any comprehensive step by step document or any other help so that, it can help me figure out the final approach on the consolidation strategy from the said multiple ECC source systems.

I am trying to understand the following:

1) How will SOAP webservice trigger the consolidation steps automatically?

2) Is there any external system(any ETL tool) which will have to be deployed here to create the SOA message payload after extracting vendor data from the multiple source systems and publish that SOA payload for MDG/S4 HANA system to consume to trigger MDG Consolidation steps?

3) How will the data extraction take place from multiple source systems in this scenario?  

4) Is there any background job to be scheduled at MDG side which will read the SOA payload and trigger the MDG Consolidation steps?

5) In this case, will SOA payload populate all the Consolidation Source tables?

Any pointer in this regard would be much appreciated.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Re: Custom fields are not displayed in the system-generat...
entry.content: Please see the link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/0c034158732c9244e1000000...

entry.title: Re: BW Query statistics not available for CDS-based Queri...
entry.content:
Thanks Sheldon. I have done following changes to capture the Query statistics.

1) Deleted the entry for Object = 'RSDDSTAT_GLOBAL_OFF' in Table RSADMIN by using program SAP_RSADMIN_MAINTAIN.

2) In transaction RSDDSTAT, switched on the statistics for the Queries

3) In Analysis for Office, activated the parameter 'AlwaysDoApplicationSteps' in technical configuration.

entry.title: Re: NOT ABLE TO POST PO FOR NLAG MATERIALS
entry.content: Did you use the same PO type (non-stock)

entry.title: if the next order is processed in VF01 SAP, an invoice without items is created.
entry.content:
Hello, everybody.

S4Hana

In transaction VF01 I process the first order - invoice is created, no errors. Then, without leaving the VF01 transaction, I specify the next order, but two invoices are created during processing. The first one is correct and corresponds to the order, the second one is erroneous with empty data, without item lines. The time of creation is identical in the two invoices. If I continue to process new orders, the invoices are created three, four, etc. The first invoice in the set is correct, the other invoices are empty with no line items.

I understand that this is a program error, not settings, because there is a parallel ERP system (not S4Hana) and there is no such error, and the settings are the same. I can't find a note to fix the error.

entry.title: Aquire to decomission process
entry.content: Team for aquire to decomission process which is the start point apart from manual approvals and budgeting , is purchase requisition with account assignment assets the start point ? and how can eam work order process be integrated at what point in time since the asset procurement is being done at company level and we cannot raise purchase requisitions from work order to just to procure so many assets. Do we have an integrated best practice document which displays flow right from planning to procurement to commision.?

entry.title: EDI Intercompany - Purchase order to sales order
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I would like to create a sales order (VA01) from a purchase order (ME21N) via EDI.

Unfortunately, I can't get any further with the automatic partner determination.

Purchasing org 1710 (= internal business partner: 17411710) orders from vendor BP1010 (= SalesOrg 1010)

Scenario:

ME21N:
Order type: NB
Purchasing organization: 1710
Supplier: BP1010

By message type 6 EDI -> Create sales order

VA01:
Order type: OR
Sales area: 1010/10/00
Customer: 17411710

I have made the following settings:
WE20: Partner profiles

 

WE05:

VOE2: 

BP is created in Sales Area

 

 

Does anyone recognize what I did wrong?
I simply have a gap in my knowledge that I would like to fill.

Thank you!!!

BR, Ritchie

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
Hi @VaibhavBhandegaonkar 

Yes.

Technically speaking, consuming Odata from an S/4HANA is not a replication, it is a consumption, but that's not the point of the discussion.

As SAP indicates in note 3255746 (last update 2024); 

The Operational Data Provisioning (ODP) framework for data extraction and replication is exposed by an official and externally-available OData API and can still be used (link to documentation) but there are no plans to enhance this interface based on the strategic direction towards using replication flows in SAP Datasphere. When using the OData interface, which is based on OData version V2, you may need to check the performance impact of your data replication process in case you replicate large volumes of data.

OData is not going away, still, ABAP-based systems like SAP ECC or SAP S/4HANA (on-premise/private cloud), SAP Gateway plays a pivotal role in enabling OData services for external consumption of SAP data structures and business logic, trough ABAP APIs, Function Modules, or CDS Views and I see no indication of that going away.

That said, SAP in 2025 introduced Business Data Cloud BDC where Data is replicated to BDC and from there exposed for external sources to be consumed (zero ETL). Exposure and Consumption are key words to understand nowadays, in S/4HANA and BDC.

Datasphere Flows and/or POI, and Business Data Cloud should be the tools to be used.

entry.title: New integration flow design guidelines covering Exactly Once In Order pattern
entry.content:
With the support for exclusive JMS queues in the Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Suite, you are now able to run scenarios supporting Exactly Once In Order delivery, see Configure the JMS Sender Adapter and Configure the JMS Receiver Adapter .

If you like to learn how to setup Exactly Once In Order in Cloud Integration, check out the new integration flow design guidelines at Quality of Service Exactly Once In Order.

Here. we have described different scenarios using the exclusive JMS queues: a general use case, combinations of XI and SAP RM adapter, SFTP as sender. Furthermore, we have described a scenario using partitioned queues of SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh.

Note: The usage of SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh and the Advanced Event Mesh adapter depends on your SAP Integration Suite service plan, see SAP note 2903776.

For the exclusive queues, you guarantee In Order delivery by having one single consumer at any time. For partitioned queues using the SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh, you can define multiple partitions within a non-exclusive queue, the messages are then mapped to a particular partition, message order is kept within a partition by allowing only one consumer for a partition.

If you like to try out the guidelines, as usually, we have shipped sample integration flows on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub within the package Integration Flow Design Guidelines - Enterprise Integration Patterns.

We will soon publish more details about the exclusive JMS queues, so stay tuned.

entry.title: SAP GRDC AD hoc items Transport
entry.content:
In SAP Group Reporting Data Collection (GRDC), is it possible to transport Ad Hoc Items across systems (e.g., from Dev to QA)?

If transports aren't supported for these items, what would be the recommended best practice to transfer them between environments without having to recreate them manually?

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Automatic welcome mail to new hires
entry.content: KBA2443557 - Is it possible to include an attachment file to the Welcome email notification for your reference: https://me.sap.com/notes/2443557/E

entry.title: Cannot create return to suppliers for third party purchase orders
entry.content:
In third party purchase scenario, cannot create return to suppliers for third party purchase orders

  1. Purchase requests and orders work center
  2. Common task: create new RTS
  3. Query all inbound deliveries by selection, search with purchase order ID
  4. Execute: no records found

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Value mapping issue Migration Cockpit ERP to S/4HANA Migration
entry.content: Hi Moritzbd,How was this error solved?

entry.title: Re: Cannot create return to suppliers for third party pur...
entry.content:
Hi,

When creating new RTS, for third party customer returns, use query: Third-party customer return items by selection.

Then search with customer return notification ID , or follow up customer return delivery ID, instead of PO ID.

Then you can find the product.

 

You can also refer to Help documentation:  Third-Party Order Processing — Customer Return

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/2cf04c30722d101481a4ecd36a68e104.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Receiving multiple emails when moving candidates to H...
entry.content:
This is working as expected. It is currently not possible to send a consolidated email. This limitation is also mentioned in the KBA you shared.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: Value mapping issue Migration Cockpit ERP to S/4HANA Migration
entry.content: Hi Moritzbp, I'm also facing the same issue. I don't see any error in Migration cockpit. How was this error solved?

entry.title: Data fields description (not anonymized during test instance refresh)
entry.content:
Dear Community,

In order to be able to set up a test environments refresh policy for my company I need to obtain the description of data provided under fields that are not being not anonymized. I have raised this topic on SAP for Me portal under ticket no. 420302/2025, however was advised that "The circumstances you describe relate to a consulting problem, rather than a problem with the product. As a support team we only handle issues and defects in the system and have limited scope when it comes to consulting / how-to questions. What we suggest is to reach out to the Partner Delivery Community to get assistance as this type of request is not handled by the Product Support team." I will add that I was not able to find data fields description under https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/using-instance-refresh-tool/instance-refresh-data-anonymization-fields KBA as well. The fields I would like to understand in the first instance are:

- Employee Central - actor
- Employee Central - role_id
- Employee Central - COMPA_RATIO
- Employee Central emp_paycomp:AMOUNT 
- Employee Central emp_paycomp:PERCENT 
- Employee Central emp_paycomp:NUMBER 
- Employee Central PLACE_OF_BIRTH 
- Employee Central suffix 
- Employee Central account_number 
- Employee Central job_title 
- Employee Central extension 
- Employee Central IM_INFO 
- Employee Central amount 
- Employee Central EMP_JOB_INFO 
- Employee Central National_ID 
- Employee Central calculated_amount 

For example: what does "Actor" mean?

Thank you in advance for any help in this area.

Monika

entry.title: Re: CI-DS list multiple items in a parameter to extract v...
entry.content:
hello, 

we are using CDS views in ECC and implement all logic here. 

CPI only receives the relevant data and we avoid additional manipulation / filtering in CPI that implemented logic is only in one place. 

Regards Dirk

entry.title: Re: Getting error while executing FAGLGVTR
entry.content:
AJRW is only a technical transaction to open a new year in assets, AJAB performs the actual closing of a fiscal year once every other run is performed (depreciations, etc.) You cannot keep more than 2 years open, so perform the actual closing 2023 with transaction AJAB.

  • KBA 2584908 - Error message AA761 - "Fiscal year change in co.code XXXX possible only after year-end closing YYYY" 
  • Online Help Fiscal Year Change in Asset Accounting

entry.title: Unable to find the template "automatic creation of purchase orders from requisitions"
entry.content:
Hi 

I could not find the template "automatic creation of purchase orders from requisitions" in Schedule Purchasing Job fiori App. Can anyone help ?

Regards 

Soufiane

entry.title: Re: Bank Payment Advice document ID generated by system S...
entry.content:
Hello Harish,

Bank advice transaction ID / Document ID is generated by the System automatically. 
This number range is reset with the Calendar year. So Everyyear the document number starts with one. 
THis number is derived based on the posting date of the advice per company.

So each company in the system could have the advice ID starting with 1 every calendar year.

I hope this explains the behaviour.
However there is no configuration available to control / define the number range for the bank advice.

Regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: Russia bank account number validations
entry.content:
Hi Raymond,

Thank you so much for sharing this. In our situation, the bank account starts with '04' and is a valid bank account (As mentioned in the note - "The bank numbers of the commercial bank institutes in Russia do start with '04'). The problem we are facing is that the bank details are actually valid but do not follow the logic placed in FI_CHECK_BANK_ACCOUNT_RU. And SAP acknowledges this gap (gray zone) in the bank information, that SAP cannot validate successfully in the note 2312018 .

I wanted to understand whether there was any official document that talks about the actual logic that SAP is doing to validate a RU bank, and also to understand whether there were any other workarounds apart from turning off the validation for RU in OY17 or just setting this error message as warning for a particular user(s) in OBA5. Both seem like a compromise to validating the bank correctly in the case of user entering actually incorrect bank information.

I will look further into the search you shared! 🙂

entry.title: Re: I need to add currency in drop down list for Job requ...
entry.content:
Based on the attached screenshots, I can see that the labels are missing for the filter fields. These labels are retrieved from the Internal and External Career Search Settings. Please validate the label used on this page and configure the same under Manage Templates as well.

Thanks,

Sanjeet

entry.title: Can fields be extended on SAP public cloud App Park Supplier Invoices

entry.title: Re: EDI Intercompany - Purchase order to sales order
entry.content: Check this blog: Integrating MM & SD Modules in Same Client to Create Sales order in Supplying Company Code Using PO raised in Receiving Company Code By I-Doc Message Type ORDERS Part1 and following documents.

entry.title: WEF-129753 - New Rich Text Editor toolbar is hiding formatting buttons (1H 2025)
entry.content:
Hi all
Does anyone like the new Rich Text Editor toolbar that came in with the 1H 2025 b2505 Release? We and especially our admins in the Learning Module who have to rely on Rich Text formatting of the content to make it more appeasing for the employees on a daily basis, find the new editor a huge step backwards, because it hides the majority of the formatting buttons under a "..." dropdown menu.

The new user experience is maddingly frustrating and not helpful at all. We understand the need to step away from 3rd party editors, but not the fact that for experienced users half of the buttons are 1 additional click and lots of scrolling away

I created an enhancement request to have the buttons on the toolbar made visible. Please vote if you agree Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence or please let me know if there are other options.

entry.title: Re: Awesome SAP Stammtisch Gurugram 16-April-2025 - Thank you!
entry.content: Thank you, Chetan! The energy at yesterday’s SAP Stammtisch Gurugram at Cyber Hub was indeed awesome, making it a fantastic opportunity to unwind, network, and exchange ideas. Looking forward to many more such awesome events ahead!

entry.title: Re: Does Recruitment support auto-delegation of workflows?
entry.content: Yes, it will be the immediate manager of that person. However, it will only work for a few scenarios, such as Time Off and the other one I mentioned in my previous post.

Regards,

Mihai

entry.title: Sustainable Footprint Management ERROR no Buyer-assigned product ID.
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I am trying to import materials from a connected public cloud demo system into the SFM Manage Supplier Footprint app. I am using the template for the application. However, when I attempt to upload, the system returns the following error: 'No Buyer ID exists.' What could be the cause of this issue?

As a side note, I was able to successfully upload one material for the same supplier previously.

 

#sfm #buyer #sustainablefootprintmangement

entry.title: What is planned for the 2505 release of SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing?
entry.content:
The 2505 release of SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing is planned to be deployed to BTP customer tenants on May 07, 2025:

Administration UI and Administration service:

Release

Test/Non-Productive & Productive Upgrades

2505

May 7, 2025

Variant Configuration service & Pricing service:

Release

Test/Non-productive Upgrade

Productive Upgrade

2505

May 7, 2025

May 21, 2025

 

This blog covers the following planned innovations:

  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Locks Against Changes
  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Deprecation of /closeSession
  • Configuration and Pricing Services – WHERE LIKE Database Selects in Local Extensions
  • Pricing service – New APIs For Currency Conversion
  • Pricing service – Return Used Pricing Attributes
  • Variant Configuration service – Limit the Number of Conflicts
  • Variant Configuration service – Return Dependency Id in a Conflict
  • Variant Configuration service – Return Context and Source
  • Variant Configuration service – Search By BOM Application
  • Administration – Delta Replication Monitoring Details
  • Administration – SDI Agent Details

 

It also includes a call to act regarding the following change:

  • Configuration and Pricing Services – Deprecation of /closeSession

 

Please check the updated roadmap and release notes after the release date to see which of these features were delivered as planned.

 

Disclaimer

The information in this presentation is confidential and proprietary to SAP and may not be disclosed without the permission of SAP.
Except for your obligation to protect confidential information, this presentation is not subject to your license agreement or any other service or subscription agreement with SAP. SAP has no obligation to pursue any course of business outlined in this presentation or any related document, or to develop or release any functionality mentioned therein.

This presentation, or any related document and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice. The information in this presentation is not a commitment, promise or legal obligation to deliver any material, code or functionality.  This presentation is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. This presentation is for informational purposes and may not be incorporated into a contract. SAP assumes no responsibility for errors or omissions in this presentation, except if such damages were caused by SAP’s intentional or gross negligence.

All forward-looking statements are subject to various risks and uncertainties that could cause actual results to differ materially from expectations. Readers are cautioned not to place undue reliance on these forward-looking statements, which speak only as of their dates,
and they should not be relied upon in making purchasing decisions.

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – Locks Against Changes

The requirement was to lock certain configurations or pricing documents against changes.

A new endpoint, PATCH /pricing/documents/{documentId}/lock. will be introduced to flag a pricing document as locked or not locked. The default setting is not locked. If a pricing document is locked, it cannot be deleted, nor changed, that means, for example adding or removing an item or adding or removing a manual condition is not possible.

Lock Pricing Document

The existing endpoint GET /pricing/documents/{documentId} will be enhanced to return the locked flag for a document. The existing endpoint GET /pricing/documents will be enhanced to allow searching for locked documents.

On the configuration side, a new endpoint, PATCH /configurations/{configurationId}/lock, will be introduced analogously to flag a configuration as locked or not locked. The default setting is not locked. If a configuration is locked, it cannot be deleted, nor can it be changed, this means that neither adding, nor removing a characteristic value or resetting the configuration is possible.

The existing endpoints such as GET /configurations/{configurationId} will be enhanced to return the locked flag for a configuration. The existing endpoint GET /externalConfigurations will be enhanced to allow searching for locked configurations.

Only pricing documents and configurations that were created with autoCleanup=false can be locked against changes.

Copying locked pricing documents via POST pricing/documents/{documentId}/copy and copying locked configurations via POST /externalConfigurations will always result in unlocked copies.

More information will be published with the May release in the API Definition of the Pricing service and the Variant Configuration service and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production).

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – Deprecation of /closeSession

The endpoints POST /closeSession of the configuration and pricing services used to be used to remove configurations and pricing documents from the HTTP session. This is no longer required, because of improved resource management.

The endpoints are set to be deprecated and will be removed with release 2605.

Action: If called from your application, remove those calls before the May release next year (2026).

More information will be published with the 2025 May release in the API Definition of the Pricing service and the Variant Configuration service and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production).

 

Configuration and Pricing Services – WHERE LIKE Database Selects in Local Extensions

The sap.db() API to read table content from local extensions will support wildcards with LIKE operator in WHERE clauses of SELECT statements. The wildcard characters ‘%’ and ‘_’ can be used. The percentage sign (%) wildcard matches zero or more characters. The underscore (_) wildcard matches exactly one character.

Examples:

  1. Select all customers from a city that starts with any character followed by “ondon”:
   var db = sap.db();
   var selectCityLondon = db.select()
    .columns("*")
    .from("ZMYCUSTOMERS")
    .where(
        db.like("CITY", db.string("_ondon"))
    ).build();
  1. Select all customers with a name that starts with character “A”:
   var selectCustomersStartingWithA = db.select()
    .columns("*")
    .from("ZMYCUSTOMERS")
    .where(
        db.like("NAME", db.string("A%"))
    ).build();

This functionality is only supported for DDIC tables, not for variant tables.

More information will be published in the Extension Guide (Pre-Production) with the May release.

 

Pricing service – New APIs For Currency Conversion

The new endpoint POST /currencyConversion/currencies/{fromCurrencyUnit}/convert/{toCurrencyUnit} will receive the exchange rate that is needed to convert a source currency to a target currency.

With that, the calling application can convert currencies analogously to how the Pricing service does it during price calculation.

The new endpoint also does the currency conversion and returns an output value converted into the target currency if an input value was given.

Example request:

Currency Conversion

Example response:

{
  "fromCurrency": {
    "value": "10000",
    "unit": "INR"
  },
  "toCurrency": {
    "value": "163.93",
    "unit": "USD"
  },
  "exchangeRate": {
    "fromFactor": 1,
    "toFactor": 1,
    "derivedType": "M",
    "value": "-61.00000000000",
    "validFromDate": "1900-01-01",
    "directConversion": true,
    "input": {
      "type": "M",
      "date": "2025-04-01"
    }
  }
}

To support the above, an additional new endpoint, GET /currencyConversion/currencies, will be introduced to read the settings of currency codes, like ISO code, SAP-internal code, language-dependent description, number of decimals, etc., as maintained in the back end and replicated from the back end.

Currencies Settings

Example call:

GET /currencyConversion/currencies?$filter=unit IN (‘EUR’,’USD’,’INR’)'

Response:

{
  "currencies": [
    {
      "unit": "EUR",
      "internalUnit": "EUR",
      "primary": true,
      "numberOfDecimals": 2,
      "name": "Euro",
      "description": "Euro (EMU currency as of 01/01/1999)"
    },
    {
      "unit": "EUR",
      "internalUnit": "EUR3",
      "primary": false,
      "numberOfDecimals": 2,
      "name": "Euro",
      "description": "Euro (EMU currency as of 01/01/1999)"
    },
    {
      "unit": "INR",
      "internalUnit": "INR",
      "primary": false,
      "numberOfDecimals": 2,
      "name": "Rupee",
      "description": "Indian Rupee"
    },
    {
      "unit": "USD",
      "internalUnit": "USD",
      "primary": true,
      "numberOfDecimals": 2,
      "name": "US Dollar",
      "description": "American Dollar"
    }
  ]
}

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the May release.

 

Pricing service – Return Used Pricing Attributes

We will enhance stateless pricing and document pricing endpoints as follows: For item conditions, we will return for each condition exactly those pricing attribute values that were used to find the condition record. For that, we will add the new response structure successfulAccess to item conditions as depicted below.

To get this additional information returned, it must be requested through the $select parameter:

Used Pricing Attributes

Example item condition response snippet:

         "conditions": [
            {
              "id": "a06de2ae-2779-46a7-af37-60bb1bd31f57",
              "stepNumber": 11,
              "counter": 1,
              "conditionTypeId": "PR00",
              "conditionTypeName": "Price",
              "base": "1.000",
              "rate": {
                "value": "1.00",
                "unit": "EUR"
              },
              "rateQuantity": {
                "value": 1,
                "unit": "PCE"
              },
              "value": "1.00",
              "recordId": "00000441069999123123595901000000",
              "table": "A304",
              "successfulAccess": {
                "counter": 40,
                "attributes": [
                  {
                    "name": "KOMK-VKORG",
                    "value": "0001"
                  },
                  {
                    "name": "KOMK-VTWEG",
                    "value": "01"
                  },
                  {
                    "name": "KFRST",
                    "value": ""
                  },
                  {
                    "name": "KOMP-PMATN",
                    "value": "CPS_SOFTDRINK"
                  }
                ]
              }
            },

In the above example, the response tells you that for condition type PR00 the access number 40 found an entry in condition table A304 using the following pricing attributes:

KOMK-VKORG (Sales Org)

0001

KOMK-VTWEG (Distribution Channel)

01

KFRST (Release Status)

(Released)

KOMP-PMATN (Price Material Number)

CPS_SOFTDRINK

Such information used to be found only in the engine trace. The engine trace is still required to find out why which accesses were not successful.

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the May release.

 

Variant Configuration service – Limit the Number of Conflicts

We will introduce a new query parameter conflictsTop for endpoints like GET /configurations/{configurationId}. You can use this new query parameter to specify the maximum number of conflicts that should be calculated and returned.

Limit Conflicts

Recommended: Set conflictsTop=0 to suppress conflicts calculation and improve performance if conflicts are of no interest for your consuming application.

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the May release.

 

Variant Configuration service – Return Dependency Id in a Conflict

A requirement from consultants and support teams was to also return which dependencies caused a conflict in the configuration results.

We will enhance the conflicts response structure of endpoint GET /configurations/{configurationId} to include the new response structure dependencyId, which is a list of dependencies, for example constraints, that caused the conflict.

Example conflicts response in configuration results:

  "conflicts": [
    {
      "id": "49a3ce9b",
      "type": -1,
      "name": "Constraint conflict",
      "itemIds": [
        "1"
      ],
      "variables": [
        {
          "itemId": "1",
          "characteristicId": "CPS_GARNISH1"
        },
        {
          "itemId": "1",
          "characteristicId": "CPS_OPTION_M"
        }
      ],
      "explanation": " You need to choose a garnish for burger menu sizes larger than small (S).",
      "nogoods": [
        {
          "id": "0",
          "choices": [
            {
              "itemId": "1",
              "characteristicId": "CPS_GARNISH1",
              "value": {
                "value": "N",
                "author": "Default"
              }
            },
            {
              "itemId": "1",
              "characteristicId": "CPS_OPTION_M",
              "value": {
                "value": "L",
                "author": "User"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
      "dependencyId": [
        "CPS_GARNISH_MENU"
      ]
    }
  ]

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the May release.

 

Variant Configuration service – Return Context and Source

When creating a new configuration, the context for the reference characteristics and the source of the configuration can be specified. Both, context and source, can also be overwritten using the corresponding PATCH endpoint.
Context and source used to be missing in the configuration results. Both can soon be requested as part of the configuration results by listing them in the $select query parameter like this: $select=context,source.

Request Context & Source Data

Response with Context & Source Data

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the May release.

 

Variant Configuration service – Search by BOM Application

We will introduce a new filter value bomApplication for endpoint GET /kbdetermination, which enables the search for knowledge bases by the BOM application, for example SD01 or PP01.

Search for Plant and BOM Application

More information will be published in the API Definition and in the Development Guide (Pre-Production) with the May release.

 

Administration – Delta Replication Monitoring Details

The delta replication monitoring UI will be restructured to better support the use-case of two remote sources.
There will be a new table on the top, which will list the relevant information per remote source.

Delta Replication

More information will be published in the Administration Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

Administration – SDI Agent Details

A new UI will be added to display the details of the Data Provisioning Agent that is connected to the tenant.
Prerequisite: A remote source must exist for the Data Provisioning Agent.

More information will be published in the Administration Guide (Pre-Production) with the February release.

 

With that, you have a good overview of what innovations are planned for the May release. Please check the updated roadmap and release notes after the release date to see which of these features were delivered as planned.

entry.title: Re: Unable to find the template "automatic creation of pu...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

from your screenshot no one will be able to really tell where the issue is.

To me this looks rather you opened the wrong fiori application job app. There are multiple out there.

The one you are looking for is called: "Schedule Purchasing Jobs - Advanced". This one should contain exactly two job templates. 

 

  • Automatic Creation of Purchase Orders from Requisitions

  • Create Scheduling Agreement Releases

On your screenshot I see none of them. So I am wildly guessing that you opened the wrong app.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
Thanks @MarioDeFelipe for the comment, it's very useful.

We do come across clients who have low data volume and don't want to spend anything additional money on data orchestration or integration tool. I assume in this case oData services on top of SAPI extractors or CDS view would be cheaper way for data movement.

entry.title: Re: if the next order is processed in VF01 SAP, an invoic...
entry.content:
I specify the next order, but two invoices are created during processing.

When you create a new discussion, please try to explain your issue with related screen shots for better understanding.  Your above statement is not clear.  When you say, you specify the next order, is it that two invoices were created against the same sales order?  If so, it could have been due to invoice split logic.  If not, share the issue in detail

entry.title: Re: Cost center budgeting for eam order
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you can actually find this out quite easily by looking at the SAP Road Map Explorer: https://roadmaps.sap.com/welcome#/

 

How to use it: https://community.sap.com/t5/blogs-about-sap-websites/discover-how-to-use-sap-road-map-explorer-in-five-steps/ba-p/13515886

 

 

I couldn't see such a feature on the asset management, so maybe you want to open that as a new feature requirement using the SPA influence tool?

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: How to read Correlation ID Received in Datashpere
entry.content: you have to perform query in your Hana db as bellow

entry.title: Re: How to read Correlation ID Received in Datashpere
entry.content: you have to perform query in your Hana db SELECT * FROM SYS.AUTHENTICATION_ERROR_DETAILS WHERE CORRELATION_ID = '<your correlation ID>';

entry.title: Re: Where can I start learning features and functions of SAP Sustainability Data Exchange?
entry.content:
Hi @Christian_Waellermann 
Thank you for sharing. 
You are absolutely the Onboarding Resource Center - SAP Sustainability Data Exchange is a very important place. It is the the stop-shop for all the resources you need to seamlessly onboard your team and kick-start your sustainability journey with SAP Sustainability Data Exchange.
We link to this stop-shop on our SAP Solutions for Sustainability learn by product site.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.content:

Rule "INTG-EC-POS-OC-DefaultMinMid" execution failed with error "Error setting 'cust_Min' with value '' [Unparseable number: ""]"

entry.title: Re: Request for Creating a Field in SF to Sum External Co...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for your query. This is Hannah from SuccessFactors Employee Central Team.

Please consider using function "format()" of business rule to combine different objects into a meaningful text. Official handbook for your reference:

You use this function to combine different objects into a meaningful text. For example, you can use this function to combine the country code (for example, DE), business unit name (for example, SMB), and a number (for example, 111) to one text: DESMB111.

 

Best regards,

Hannah

entry.title: Re: Candidate profile
entry.content: If someone applied while still employed but has since left the compnay, will the application type in RCM akso change - specifically, will it switch from "internal" to external? I'm referring to the application type that appears next to the candidate's name in RCM.

entry.title: Preview/Print of a Document (Crystal Report) not working
entry.content:
Hallo SAP B1 Community,

i have the problem that, when i want to print a Document as CrystalReport i get 3 Errors:

Invalid path for report file
Invalid path for report file
Cannot load the rpt file

If i import the Exact same report on a different SAP B1 Installation (always HANA) the Prints and Preview is working fine.
What could be the issue i am missing?
(i cleaned the tmp cached files already mutliple times) and i need the Crystal Report to print from the Web Client.

entry.title: Re: Using Fiori apps Project Cost Overview and Project Cost Line Items for Project Reporting
entry.content:
Dear @andrea_langlotz ,

Thank you very much this comprehensive blog post. I am facing issues regarding the mandatory selection criteria "GL Account Hierarchy". I already did quite some research on this as in my case there is no GL Account Hierarchy available yet in App F6991

I found note 3499086 - Project Cost Overview [F6991] - no value in GL Account Hierarchy - SAP for Me which states that 'G/L Account hierarchies should be created in the app Manage Global Hierarchies'. I have not tried it via the app as of my understanding it should also be possible from SAP GUI side as mentioned here Manage your hierarchies in FIORI 1/3 - SAP Community or here How to synchronize Set Controlling Hierarchies in ... - SAP Community just that in this specific case it is a G/L Account hierarchy.

My question: For F6991 is it mandatory to create/import via 'Manage Global Hierarchies' or is there a way to do it via SAP GUI replication as described below?

I followed the steps to replicate the hierarchy but it seems that compared to other Apps/Analytical Queries such as 'Display Line Items in General Ledger' (F2217) that use G/L Account Hierarchies, F6991 seems to use a different type of G/L Account Hierarchy. Why do I think so?

When I replicate following steps :

  1. HRY_REPRELEV -> set report relevancy for set class 0109 (Account Group)
  2. Use Report FINS_REPLICATION_HIER to replicate

The result in table HRRP_DIRECTORY is that I can see the replication worked, but the hierarchy type is of 'FSVN - Financial Statement Version '. Therefore it is still not shown in F6991 but in other finance/controlling apps. 

Is there a certain hierarchy type I would need to use or do I have to use App 'Manage Global Hierarchies'?

Thank you for your support and clarification!

Best regards

Paul

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. Could you provide a setup tutorial and example so I can know how to do it manually? Thanks

entry.title: Shift Scenarios in SAP SF Time Tracking
entry.content:
We are facing an issue with shift regularization where employees work a different shift than assigned, leading to incorrect attendance records.

 

Issue Details:

 

We have the following shift patterns:

 

6 AM – 2 PM

2 PM – 10 PM

10 PM – 6 AM

 

Employees have the flexibility to regularize their shifts. However, in many cases, when an employee is assigned to a particular shift but works in a different one, their attendance is being incorrectly captured under the assigned shift instead of the actual worked shift. This type of issue we are facing in most of the employee who work in these shifts.

 

Example:

Employee “10002745” was assigned to the night shift (10 PM – 6 AM) on March 22, but instead, they worked the morning shift (6 AM – 2 PM) on March 23. Their punches were recorded as:

 

In-time: 5:41 AM

Out-time: 2:14 PM

 

The system incorrectly considered the 5:41 AM punch under the previous night shift (March 22, 10 PM – 6 AM) instead of the actual morning shift (March 23, 6 AM – 2 PM). Due to this, the employee's attendance records for March 22, 23, and 24 are completely incorrect.

 

If we are doing the shift regularization system still not able to correct these records.

 

Important note: We cannot use Round off Option because client want actual punch to be records in the system.

We have below Question that we need solution or best practice.

 

Question : 1àHow can we prevent the system from incorrectly mapping attendance punches to the wrong shift?

 

Question: 2à we can configure the system so that if punch is recorded after a defined threshold time it is considered under the next shift instead of the previous shift. Is there any standard system setting or workaround.

 

Question: 3à Is there an alternative configuration or rule we can apply to ensure attendance is captured correctly based on actual worked shifts rather than assigned shifts?

entry.title: Re: Credit Management Migration Cockpit - Further information issue

I find this SAP community post about "Q1" updates.

I struggle to find details for the coming 2025.05.10 update.
Hopeful I'm not the only person with the question and you or someone can guide me to the details on future releases.

Best Regards, Wallace

entry.title: Re: Unable to find the template "automatic creation of pu...
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks for your reply!

No, it is exactly the right App, just one template existed.

I had to add the job catalog "SAP_MM_PUR_ME59N_J" in SPRO T-code SIMG.

After that, I found the template in the same App

Thanks!

Regards

Soufiane

entry.title: Re: problem with conversion to S/4HANA 2023 phase XPRAS_A...
entry.content: You don't need to activate the embedded BW if you don't want to - you can also use the named transaction RSZTABLES and delete the object from the check result by doubleclicking it. Then you get a new window which has a deletion option. We used this as we don't use the embedded BW in our system.

entry.title: Pessimistic Locking between different OData-Requests with use of C_ENQUEUE?!
entry.content:
Hi Community,
we developed a fiori-app on top of a pure abap-solution for a purchase-to-pay solution from our partner to extend the reach to customers with a clear fiori-strategy.
The partner abap-solution works with SAPGui Transactions. In the past they used a separate locking table to manage the locks to their business-documents. The OData-Services of our Fiori-Solution used this table also to deal with locking.

In the newest release of our partner-solution they changed locking. The do not use a own locking-table but change to use sap locking by ENQUEUE and DEQUEUE, which means to use pessimistic locking in the transaction. The business-object is locked when starting the transaction and release at the end of the session. An administrator can use SM12 to have a look at active lockings and my manually release lockings.
Unfortunately this is now a heavy problem for our fiori-app because the OData-Requests are stateless and so locks set after reading data in the odata-implementation are automatically release when the request is finished. The are some articles in the community here which propose to use optimistic locking instead in a fiori-app with OData (for example with the usage of etag in headers). But this is only possible and integer when the hole solution is using the same locking. So it is not consistent and safe to use optimistic locking from the fiori-app TOGETHER with pessimistic locking with ENQUEUE/DEQUEUE in SAPGui transactions.

So i actually trying hard to use pessimistic locking in our OData-Backend. For this i found a blog describing how to use pessimistic locking by usage of the internal function module 'C_ENQUEU'. 

There is a nice blog which describes this: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/pessimistic-lock-in-sap-netweaver-gateway-odata-without-using-soft-state/ba-p/13477112

Based on this article i am able to the locks which are visible in sm12 and the transactions of the partner-abap solution recognize this lock and handles it the intended way.
Also i am able to release the lock with a subsequent OData-Request.

But actually nevertheless i have a big problem using this solution. If there is no subsequent request from this same user which unlocks the object the lock remains "for ever" in the system or some uses sm12 to delete to lock manually.
So my question is: How i am able to unlock such a lock from another user (the idea is to have normal request to lock if a lock still exists (which works already) and to release this lock (if its longer than a specific time). But there is the second problem: even if i'm able to see when the lock is created in sm12 the FuBa ENQUEUE_READ is not returning this lock creation date/time (only default 0-values are returned for date and time).

Any ideas are hardly welcome
regards and happy eastern
Matthias

entry.title: About scope items for material closing period(MMPV)
entry.content:
Dear [SAP Team/SAP Support],

Which scope item does the material closing period (MMPV) function apply to?
Until version 2402, it was listed in the scope item BEI (period end processing plant),but it seems to have been discontinued when version 2408 was released.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
entry.content: I tried many times to follow your steps, but could not link between SAC and Datasphere. How can do it?

entry.title: Mispunch Issue in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Problem Statement : There is no differentiation between no-punch and single punch in SAP SuccessFactors. So in order to identify the cases which were absent (no punch) and that with single punch are not able to segregate because of which calculation of pay days is affected.

 

We can only receive data when both the punch in and out are received i.e. in pair. Hence need a solution over this. Single punch is however available on standard Timesheet UI to employees but it cannot be stored in database unless it is paired and can only be fetched via API after pairing of records.

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)
entry.content:
Thanks Daniel for clearly articulating about the Predictive accounting and it's application for Sales Orders & Travel expenses.

I am seeking some help in the context of ECC to S4HANA Migration. ECC legacy system has main scenario of sales orders transaction data that is to be migrated, sales orders that are closed, partially delivered, partially invoiced and fully open line items. And in S4HANA predictive accounting is activated. 

What approach shall we take to migrate sales orders from legacy to S4HANA, considering PRA entries shall be generated or be manually generated using the given program. ? 

Please share if you have any related experience or a view on this. Thanks in advance.

It looks really promising and I look forward to working with this as soon as possible.

Thank,

Erik Ebert - Pentos

What approach shall we take to migrate sales orders from legacy to S4HANA, considering PRA entries shall be generated or be manually generated using the given program. ?

entry.title: Re: What's the meaning of "DB: Fetch" versus "Fetch" in SAT? (also: Open)
entry.content: Thank you. Yes, it must be the right explanation. NB: I see that the checkbox "database-related operations" in the SAT variant is always selected also in ABAP 7.58. I guess that the only solution is to use the ALV filter to filter out these DB lines from the ALV of the trace display.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Launchpad: New Fast and Easy Option to Adapt SAP-delivered Launchpad Content (for On
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

I just wanted to share the solution about this issue. There are few steps mentioned below should be done. My system landscape is: Fiori embedded, version 2022.

1. When saving in Fiori Launchpad Application Manager (Adaption mode) and facing the issue "Unable to save" -> due to missing Tile ID (not App ID) -> pls follow SAP note 3372215 - Unable to save changes in the Fiori Launchpad Application Manager - SAP for Me

2. Ensure that you have selected the Workbench Transport request during the Adaption process. -> 3583856 - Adapted Changes in Application Manager Not Reflected in SAP Fiori Launchpad - SAP for Me

3. If the Sap-delivered back-end Technical catalog, after making the Adaption, we need to run the Replication process to get Front-end Business catalog (which has the reference to back-end Technical catalog) updated. Replicate Technical Catalogs for all Available System Aliases | SAP Help Portal

I hope this helps to those who face this issue.

Best Regards,

Tuyen.

Hi Marius and Srinivasan,

first of all sorry for the late reply.

  • Does the problem (see description below) still persist?
  • Which catalog did you try out?
  • Are you working with Hub deployment (standalone front-end server) or with an embedded deployment?
  • Are you trying to do the adaptation on the frontend-server?

'However, I wanted to ask if there is a restriction regarding backend catalogues delivered by SAP as i tried to change the title of a tile or the icon and getting the error "Error while trying to save". Is this due to the nature of replicable catalogues? If this would be the case, I think we can't use the feature because we would have to adapt tiles in different ways and this would be contraproductive to keep the content manageable.

Release is S/4 and FES 2022/01'

Do you have a guide for abap destination creation?

Thanks.

BR,

Ian

entry.title: Re: Mass Upload Task Capability in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi @bp9,

Thank you for the valuable information provided. We are considering this option for uploading a lean set of project activities, based on the Activate task list for S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 3SL. In other words: download the full list of roadmap tasks to Excel, remove the tasks that are not necessary for a specific roll-out project using Excel and then upload the tasks to a new CALM project.

Question: is the content upgrade for Activate maintained with every release, using this approach? If not, what is the recommended approach?

Thanks and regards,
Gerard

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning Layout related
entry.content: I understand that you need reporting based on two different dimensions. But can you clarify 1. what are the GL accounts used for MRR ?? is it one GL account or multiple ? 2. What are the profit centers used for NRR, MRC or NRC ??

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
Guys, 

We had a official discussion with SAP Strategy team and SAP Data architects too. Before talking about ODP also we should think from governance perspective.

Data Governance and Certified Data Product :

  • In exisitng BW while sending data to Datalake or Data mesh there - there is no restriction in data access for example in Earlier scenario is just BW alone and there is no AI related use cases in olden days.
  • Now if Datalake or AWS datamesh or Azure Datamesh connects to SAP BW and gets whole data from table to table or APIs, there is no restriction at field level and also API leven as they will get data using Standard Tables, Standard ODATA APis and if those are activated for specific other satellite purpose they can get that API catalogue in default connection and use those and download any sensitive data too. 
  • If you use NLB or Reverse proxy it will mask the internal hostname and port but you cannot restict at API or field level and its tedious activity for 100s of APis and field level.
  • Suppose if they download that entire data and train in LLM models then you can ask salary of specific employee in chatgpt or Models.
  • In SAP BDC - Business Data Cloud with Datasphere - similar to API management, API products - they have Data Products, Data Context, Data Governance with restrictions can be applied based on business or data context using access permissions.
  • At same time, once data comes into SAP BDC - you can replace BW with BDC and also get rid of ODP protocol issue too.
  • Now its customers choice, whether they use whole BDC - SAP Suite (like BDC with Datasphere+Databricks for AI+hana lakestorage) OR BDC as a warehouse + ADLS/S3 storage + DataBricks (SAP or Azure) so that you can get overall data for AI usecases with governance in place too.
  • Also you can get standard Data Product out of box and you can also join other data coming from ext apps and create custom dataset by sending data to Datasphere or else using databtircks post AI use case, you can create new data product too and rollout for business.

     

 

ODP Topic:

ODATA APIs should not be used for mass data volume. Even we explored multiple hyerscalers like Fabric Datamesh, AWS, Databricks, etc.

For example : Fabric microsoft documentation itself says it is not even recommended ODATA APIs for tens or hundreds of million records. Integrate your SAP data into Microsoft Fabric | Microsoft Fabric Blog | Microsoft Fabric

Also SAP has explained below: ODATA APIs talks at top layer and whereas ODP talks at CDS view layer.

Definitely there is a slowness if you talk at AWS Analytical ODATA APIs (in their connector documentation) or Fabric Documentations too. Since ODP is closed they are recommending ODP only.

entry.title: Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from perspective of Supplier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Members, can you please suggest Steps/Processes for following SAP Business Scenario

  1. Company A and Company B belong to same Group of Companies and have SAP implemented, but each of them has different company Codes.
  2. The Company B is Subcontracting Supplier of the Company A which is the Customer.
  3. What method can be used by Company B to do GR from Company A for Processing/Subcontracting.
  4. Also, the material received at Company B should only be updated Quantity wise in its stock. Since it is valuated stock for Company A.
  5. Once the material is processed at Company B what method can be used to dispatch the processed material from Company B to Company A. This should also consider the revision of stock.

Abstract: In short, what can be the process for Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from the perspective of Supplier i.e. Company B?

Your suggestions are deeply appreciated.

entry.title: Re: What's the meaning of "DB: Fetch" versus "Fetch" in SAT? (also: Open)
entry.content: That depends on your use case. If you are sure that DB execution time is no problem you can filter them out. But if you initially have no clue where the performance bottleneck is you better leave it in. This example also shows that you better restrict the query to what you need as transport back to ABAP layer takes twice as much time as the DB execution. --> Code pushdown

entry.title: Re: "Configure" menu not visible in Integration Suite whe...
entry.content:
Hi Charlie_Lin

First you need to assign role collections 1) APIManagement.SelfService.Administrator and 2) APIPortal.Administrator

For this you need to go to security(in btp cockpit)->Users(select your user)->Click on Roll Collections->Assign Roll Collections

Here you need to select the above two role collections.

Then clear your cache and when you log in after clearing cache, you will find API under settings in "Integration Suite".

When you click API under Settings it will take sometime for provisioning.

Finally when you log in again you will find the required "Configure" options in "Integration Suite"

entry.title: Re: Delegated User Administration Using Attribute-Based Access Control in SAP Cloud Identity Service
entry.content:
Hi @ValAtanassov 

Excellent Blog, I do have some requirement which I'm struggling to figure out.

I have segregated set of users and create a separate group for them, these users doesn't have any email id and their username = employee number

I'm trying to create ABAX Policy to reset password, unlock users only to the people consisting in this user group. I tried to match user.username = employeeNumber but it is not supported attribute

Is there way we can create policy to match users attributes = group name?

entry.title: Re: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction through AWS Glue
entry.content:
•  Infact, you can get all 300+ open connectors of Integration suite here as well to connect to any legacy app or satellite saas application and join that data with SAP and create custom data sets too.
  • Option-1: If you take whole SAP BDC suite then its zero ETL and everything is native including DataBricks on BTP + Datasphere on BTP + SAC + Datalake storage. No need of investing on ETL as entire stack sits here in BTP.
  • Option-2:  Suppose if customers are fancy in using hyperscalers then still you need SAP BDC for overall data source and governance for both SAP and Ext Apps and then they should use databricks. Here ETL definitely requires as you need to transfer data to Hyperscaler Azure or AWS mesh.

entry.title: Business Place for Thailand in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

When I enter journal entry with tax code, the message is showing " Define Business Place". In this case , I am facing that I can't access to Define Business Place for Thailand in CBC. Which business role and catalog that I need to add for this issue? 

Thank You.

Hnin

entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
@christoph_pohl wrote:

@fabianlupa The SAP Cloud Connector integration for connecting gCTS (not abapGit!) to on-premises git repositories is currently on the roadmap for 2508 (without any obligation implied), see SAP BTP, ABAP Environment Roadmap Information | SAP Help Portal 

SAP BTP CI/CD service won't help you here, since your ABAP system in SAP BTP needs to be able to access the git repository.

Checking back on this to see if I can use gCTS 6 months later but it seems like the relevant roadmap item has been pushed back to 2602, so no. Is that feature not that urgent? In my experience many companies / industries are legally required to store their proprietary source code within their closed network so this is surprising to me.

entry.title: Re: SAC Story can we have mutiple GL account hierarchy in Single Table -1
entry.content: Do you mean same GL account is tagged under three different parent node?

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP React app - CSRF token validation failed - du...
entry.content:
Yes! Fixed the issue, thanks to my fantastic colleague in the UK.

The issue is that the approuter handles the csrf token stuff, but we request it from the backend. So using this (csrfProtection:false), did the trick. Not easy to find if you never dealt with it:

{ "source": "^/destination/S4H_API/(.*)$", "target": "$1", "destination": "S4H_API", "authenticationType": "XSUAA", "csrfProtection": false }

 

Cheers!

Laurens

entry.title: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option missing
entry.content: In my BTP trial account trust configuration option missing

entry.title: Re: Automatic Workarea Migration / Activation of Redesign...
entry.content: Hi Peter,

entry.title: Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process (APAC)
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Configuration Webinar Series 2025

We are thrilled to extend a warm welcome to everyone for our SAP Cloud ALM configuration webinar series.

Topic

Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process

With this session, you will

  • Uncover the fundamental value of Change and Deployment Management within SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Learn how to enable transport management for your solutions in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Discover the core capabilities of Change and Deployment Management provided by SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Gain valuable insights into the product outlook for Change and Deployment Management.

Agenda

  • SAP Cloud ALM Overview - 5 min
  • Discover how SAP Cloud ALM facilitates seamless change control management process - 35 mins
  • Live Demo 15 mins
  • Q&A - 5 mins

Register Now

We look forward to seeing you virtually!

Stay updated on upcoming sessions!

For any further queries please contact us on cloudalm@sap.com

 

If you have any questions about the session topic, please feel free to post them in the comments.

entry.title: Re: CAP CDS-Rest like operator missing
entry.content: like operator resolved for cds file ?

entry.title: Re: Automatic Workarea Migration / Activation of Redesign...
entry.content: Hi Peter, Thanks for your response. I have checked resources in our workareas including trainer style and the trainer itself. Many have been upgraded (trainer included). We haven't modified anything in Producer as yet. Any ideas on whether Workarea Migration is now automatically part of upgrading Manager and the client tools or why we are not seeing the redesigned panel yet?

entry.title: Re: Step by Step instruction to Setup / Update IAS User Passwords in Mass using Postman
entry.content: I am getting 403 forbidden access error, please help to remove it, thank you!

entry.title: Re: Quo Vadis SAP PLM
entry.content: Note: SAP PLM has since been renamed SAP IPD.

entry.title: Slow update - RSM13000 (SAPMV45A/SAPMV60A/SAPMV75A/SAPMV56A...)
entry.content:
Hello guys,

in our system like 30% of V* transactions have slow update.
Example: VA01, VA02, VA22, VT02n, VT03n, VF11…

During this slow update, users are waiting and complaining.

In ST03n I can see, 
Update V1 = slow
Update V2 = fast

There is no bottleneck in Workprocesses (UPD*) or CPU usage or anything else.
There are also several instances where update request gets distributed.
Also no problem with hanging HTTP RFC connections (SAPLHTTP_RUNTIME...).
As far as I can see there is no locking problem in SM12.

Most of time is always used under "Processing Time".

The only thing I can see is high "RFC idle time"... can this be a reason (?)
Because "calling time" and "data send time" are pretty low.


ARCHIV_CREATE_TABLE_MULT


The UPD WP is remaining in program SAPLCEI3 without more information, only time counts...
and after 5-20 seconds it will finish.

 

This happens with ~30% of update requests in V* transactions.

Maybe you have some other ideas what to check?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Suppliers shouldn't be able to enter negative values...
entry.content: Hi Jeremy, thanks for your explanations.

entry.title: Re: Suppliers shouldn't be able to enter negative values...
entry.content: @Jeremy_Deo

entry.title: Enable SAP Developer Hub as central Event Catalog
entry.content:
Introduction

In a world where event-driven architectures (EDA) are gaining traction, enterprises need a central and consistent way to document, discover, and consume events. SAP is addressing this need with an exciting roadmap initiative: enabling the SAP Developer Hub to act as a central Event Catalog.

This blog will walk you through the motivation behind this feature, how it fits into SAP’s broader strategy, and what steps you can take to prepare. We'll also include some insights into the current capabilities and what’s coming next.

 

Why a Central Event Catalog Matters

Managing asynchronous APIs and events across hybrid landscapes can quickly become complex. Having a unified developer experience—where both REST APIs and events are discoverable in one place—simplifies onboarding and integration across teams.

This aligns perfectly with SAP’s vision for a unified API consumption layer, with the SAP Developer Hub playing a central role.

Roadmap Highlights

SAP has identified several key innovations in this space, as published in the SAP Roadmap Explorer. Here are some of the most relevant items:

✅Developer Hub: Event Catalog - Basic Discovery

Link to roadmap item

SAP has enabled basic discovery of events directly via the Developer Hub. This allows developers to search, browse, and inspect event metadata just like they would with REST APIs.

✅ Expose Event Definitions via API Business Hub

Link to roadmap item

This has enabled event definitions available in a reusable and standardized format, ensuring that producers and consumers can align on payload structures, topics, and semantics.

🔜Enhanced Event Metadata

Link to roadmap item

SAP plans to enhance event metadata support, offering more insights into event types, versions, and schemas. This will enrich the Event Catalog experience and further empower developers working in event-driven scenarios.

How does it look like: Event Catalog in Developer Hub

Let's do it based on one example Event from SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh to Developer Hub.

Download AsyncAPI

In SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh navigate to Designer > API Product > Event > Download AsyncAPI

Create Event Product 

In SAP Developer Hub navigate to Admin Center > Content > Products > Add Event > Publish

Discovery SAP Events from SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh in Developer Hub

In SAP Developer search/navigate to your Event

Conclusion

The introduction of an Event Catalog in the Developer Hub is a major step forward in enabling event-driven, loosely coupled architectures in the SAP ecosystem.

If you're working with events today—or plan to—this is the right time to explore the feature, start aligning your assets, and get ready to expose your events to the wider enterprise.

🔗Don't forget to check the roadmap links above for the latest delivery timelines and feature details.

entry.title: Document Grounding - error while generating Bearer Token
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are in the process of setting up document grounding.

We are using Bruno and while generating the bearer token getting an error.

 

Let me know the reason for this error pls.

entry.title: How to add survey link to email template in SAP Sales/Service Cloud Version 2 without Qualtrics
entry.content:
Hi Friend,

How can I add a survey link to an email template, so that when a feedback flow is triggered, the customer receives an email with the survey link and can fill out the survey—without using Qualtrics?

 

Regards,

Ankita
